results.title: Phase 4.4 prompt CRUD completed end-to-end
results.content: Completed P4.4-T00 with real dynamic MCP prompt sync against FastMCP prompt manager, admin prompt CRUD routes on the SSE/admin surface, a new /dashboard/prompts Astro UI, and local Gemma 4-backed prompt polishing via minder/prompts/formatter.py and LocalModelLLM.complete_text. Verified with uv run pytest tests/unit/test_api_prompts.py tests/unit/test_prompt_registry.py and cd src/dashboard && bun check.

results.title: Mongo prompt CRUD adapter parity
results.content: Fixed MongoOperationalStore missing prompt repository methods by adding create_prompt/get_prompt_by_id/get_prompt_by_name/list_prompts/update_prompt/delete_prompt plus Mongo indexes for prompts.name and prompts.company_id. Verified with uv run pytest tests/unit/test_mongo_repos.py -k prompt.

results.title: Skill retrieval timing and markdown injection
results.content: Skill retrieval should not be locked at user submit time because clarification can change the actual task. Use an initial retrieval only as hints, then rerun skill retrieval after intent is clarified and again before major tool execution when the concrete subtask changes. The skill parser preserves markdown content, but the human-oriented coder skill search CLI output flattens formatting for terminal display; prompt injection should use raw chunk markdown or JSON instead of terminal-formatted stdout.

results.title: Dynamic Prompt CRUD via FastAPI
results.content: Added FastAPI APIRouter at src/minder/api/routers/prompts.py exposing Prompt model CRUD operations. Upgraded build_http_app in presentation/http/admin/routes.py from Starlette to FastAPI to register the router. Added PromptRegistry.register_dynamic in src/minder/prompts/__init__.py to inject DB prompts into FastMCP async during startup in server.py.

results.title: Configuration configJson uses registry-based typing
results.content: Replaced broad configJson typing with a registry-based type map in configurations so entity/DTO types are derived from feature+configKey definitions instead of Record<string, unknown> | unknown[] or a hand-maintained union. Files: src/modules/configurations/domain/types/configuration-json.types.ts, src/modules/configurations/domain/entities/configuration.orm-entity.ts, src/modules/configurations/presentation/responses/configuration-response.dto.ts
